ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI-internal cleanup, no UI involved

performance.summary: N/A - file cleanup runs synchronously during doctor/refresh, no perf constraints

security.summary: N/A - operates on local lockfiles only, no secrets or auth involved

architecture.summary: vskill.lock stays at umbrella root (correct). Fix orphaned locks in child repos from prior bugs. skills-lock.json is dead format, delete on sight. New cleanup methods in existing InstallationHealthChecker class.

integrations.summary: No external integrations. Wires into existing doctor checker class and refresh-plugins command. Delegates hash validation to existing checkLockfileIntegrity().

edge-cases.summary: Skip files with mtime < 5s to avoid corrupting concurrent writes. Aggressive delete for skills-lock.json anywhere. Conservative for vskill.lock (only orphaned child-repo copies).
